notes: Fixed the hosted Google Sheets OAuth return flow so it can return to the On-the-go beta tab instead of dropping back to the public homepage.
Preserved the signed-state OAuth protection while adding short-lived callback routing context for Google Sheets connections.
Changed Google login and Google Sheets connection buttons to same-tab links to avoid opening extra browser tabs.
Kept the Supabase migration and Secret API key access model from v0.5.74.
